title: RSA 1:11. Penalty for Alteration Without Application and Permit.
text:
Whoever violates the provisions of RSA 1:8 shall be guilty of a misdemeanor if a natural person, or guilty of a felony if any other person.

Source: Source. 2000, 35:1, eff. Jan. 1, 2001.
title_name: TITLE I THE STATE AND ITS GOVERNMENT
